source.scope: Official-source-backed United States tax year 2026 federal ordinary-income rate schedules for four individual filing statuses.

US.notes: Tax year 2026 federal ordinary-income rate schedules for single, married filing jointly, married filing separately and head-of-household returns. Preferential-rate income, deductions, credits, additional federal taxes, state and local taxes remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Tax year 2026 federal ordinary-income rate schedules for four individual filing statuses; state and local income taxes are excluded.
